scope: single-state no-training output-space Gauss-Newton/NTK relative-parameter trust-radius audit; no optimizer, checkpoint, architecture, probability-path or later-Gate change

decision_rule.linear_fail: the damped output tangent cannot fit the visible target direction; repair the output parameterization rather than the optimizer
decision_rule.local_mismatch: the FP32 autograd tangent and nonlinear forward disagree even at a 1e-4 relative parameter radius; inspect derivative/numeric implementation
decision_rule.bounded_success: a bounded natural-gradient direction lowers the nonlinear loss; ordinary optimization is limited by severe anisotropy and curvature, motivating a scalable trust-region preconditioner qualification
decision_rule.bounded_fail: the linear tangent is reachable but no preregistered local radius gives a useful nonlinear decrease; prioritize a curvature-aware coordinate parameterization rather than another output branch
decision_rule.boundary: This single-state no-training audit cannot qualify H1a, initialize production, add steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
